text:
was an episode director for Neon Genesis Evangelion as well as being credited with storyboard work and the animation of the series ending sequence. Aside from Evangelion, Masayuki was the character designer for the Macross Plus series, has worked on several other GAINAX works such as FLCL, Diebuster (Aim for the Top 2), and Tengen Toppa Gurren-Lagann. He helped with directing Rebuild of Evangelion Evangelion: 1.0 You Are (Not) Alone, Evangelion: 2.0 You Can (Not) Advance and Evangelion: 3.0 You Can (Not) Redo.

Masayuki also produced the "Full-Length Opening" and "Full-Length Ending" AMVs for the 01 Test Type DVD, and the AMVs on NGE MUSIC & REMIX DVD, which include:

ASUKA: Tamashii no Refrain (Soul Refrain)
REI: Tengoku no Kioku (Memories of Paradise)
MISATO: Thanatos -If I Can't Be Yours-

Works

Theatrical Films

Evangelion: Death and Rebirth (1997) - Director (Death), Storyboard (Death & Rebirth), Animation Director, Continuity, Design Director, Key Animation (Death)
The End of Evangelion (1997) - Storyboard, Continuity, Design Director, Key Animation (eps 25-26), Visual Water Artist
Cutie Honey (2004) - Storyboard, Associate Director
Gunbuster vs Diebuster Aim for the Top! The GATTAI!! Movie (2006) - Storyboard, Key Animation
Evangelion: 1.0 You Are (Not) Alone (2007) - Director, Key Animation
Evangelion: 2.0 You Can (Not) Advance (2009) - Director, Storyboard, Key Animation
Evangelion: 3.0 You Can (Not) Redo (2012) - Director, Storyboard, Image Board
Shin Godzilla (2016) - Storyboard, D Unit Director, D Unit Director Of Photography, D Unit Recording
Promare (2019) - Storyboard
Evangelion: 3.0+1.0 Thrice Upon A Time (2021) - Action Part Virtual Cameraman, Image Board, Key Animation, Previs Virtual Cameraman, Screen Assistant (underwater animation), Storyboard Draft
Shin Ultraman (2022) - Assistant Director (監督補)

TV Anime/OVA

Neon Genesis Evangelion (anime) (1995) - Storyboard (1, 2, 6, 11, 12, 19, 24, 26), Episode Director (eps 19, 24, 26), Animation Director (ep 24), Animation (ED), Assistant Director, Design Assistant (ep 19), Key Animation (video format version for ep. 24; 5 episodes)
FLCL (2000) - Storyboard (ep 2), Ending Animation Supervisor, Key Animation (eps 3-6)
Re: Cutie Honey (2004) - Director (ep 3), Episode Director (ep 3), Key Animation (ep 3)
Gunbuster 2: Diebuster (2004) - Storyboard (ep 5), Unit Director (OP), Key Animation (ep 3)
DARLING in the FRANXX (2018) - Storyboard (ep 4)
